allow: Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile, sys; z = zipfile.ZipFile\(sys.argv[1]\); print\(z.read\(''lib/keyboard.lua''\).decode\(\)[:1200]\)" openos.zip)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -A System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\ROM\\openos.zip'\)
\\$n = 'lib/tty.lua'
Write-Host \\"=== \\$n ===\\"
\\$e = \\$z.Entries | Where-Object { \\$_.FullName -eq \\$n }
if \(\\$e\) { \\$sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$e.Open\(\)\); Write-Host \\$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); \\$sr.Dispose\(\) }
\\$z.Dispose\(\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -A System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\ROM\\openos.zip'\)
\\$n = 'lib/shell.lua'
Write-Host \\"=== \\$n ===\\"
\\$e = \\$z.Entries | Where-Object { \\$_.FullName -eq \\$n }
if \(\\$e\) { \\$sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$e.Open\(\)\); Write-Host \\$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); \\$sr.Dispose\(\) }
\\$z.Dispose\(\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; \\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\ROM\\openos.zip'\); \\$e = \\$zip.GetEntry\('lib/package.lua'\); \\$ms = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream; \\$e.Open\(\).CopyTo\(\\$ms\); System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString\(\\$ms.ToArray\(\)\) -split '\\n' | Select-Object -Skip 64 -First 20 | ForEach-Object { \\$idx=1; \\$script:count++ }; \\$lines = \(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString\([System.IO.MemoryStream]::new\(\).ToArray\(\)\) -split '\\n'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "try { $a = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\(\(Resolve-Path ''NLua.dll''\).Path\); Write-Host ''NLua loaded:'' $a.FullName } catch { Write-Host ''NLua error:'' $_.Exception.Message }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem 'D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\*.dll' | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\$_.Name; try { [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\(\\$_.FullName\).GetTypes\(\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName } catch { Write-Host '  ERROR:' \\$_.Exception.Message } }" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "try { [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\RimComputers.dll'\); Write-Host 'Loaded OK' } catch { Write-Host \('Error: ' + \\$_.Exception.GetBaseException\(\).Message\); Write-Host \('HResult: ' + [Convert]::ToString\(\\$_.Exception.HResult, 16\)\) }" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -Path 'D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\NLua.dll','D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\KeraLua.dll'; try { \\$lua = [NLua.Lua]::new\(\); Write-Host 'Lua state created'; \\$lua.Dispose\(\) } catch { Write-Host \\$_.Exception.GetType\(\).FullName; Write-Host \\$_.Exception.Message; Write-Host \\$_.Exception.StackTrace }" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "\\$errFile = [System.IO.File]::CreateText\('C:\\temp\\lua_err2.txt'\); [Console]::SetError\(\\$errFile\); Add-Type -Path 'D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\NLua.dll','D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\Mods\\RimComputers\\Assemblies\\KeraLua.dll'; try { \\$lua = [NLua.Lua]::new\(\); \\$lua.DoString\('print\(_VERSION\)'\); \\$lua.Dispose\(\); Write-Host 'OK' } catch { Write-Host \('Exception: ' + \\$_.Exception.GetType\(\).FullName\); Write-Host \('Message: ' + \\$_.Exception.Message\) }; \\$errFile.Close\(\); Get-Content 'C:\\temp\\lua_err2.txt'" 2>&1)
